title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 25 - 2017: Random stuff in BG (forgot to do my own, whoops)

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog after getting high, recapping his day of working on his personal website — specifically audio history books, Google Earth pages, and link-checking. He also mentions downloading green screen backgrounds and sound effects for future creative projects.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: making steady progress and plans to perfect it during bike rides

stances.topic: green screen backgrounds and sound effects
stances.position: excited they can help shape his storytelling

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log for February 25th. It's 1.33 in the morning, February 26th right now, and I just got really high.
So I forgot to do a video before this. I just grabbed my computer and did it, so I don't know what I'll do. I'll have to look at what I have and decide.
So anyways, yeah, today I was linking. I started wanting to, working on audio history, audio history books, the sizes of them, and finishing how they look.
I'll finish making sure they all link right later, but, and then I got going on Google Earth stuff, and, yeah, doing, just working on the page, and then, yeah, linking it.
I linked Battles, Google Earth Battles today, and I think you can download most of the files that write for download, but, yeah, I'll make sure all that stuff later.
That's what I'll do when I'm writing the bike. When I start writing my bike, that's, my project for that will be just perfecting my site.
Just making sure all the links work and stuff. Yeah, so, but, yeah, it's coming along pretty quickly.
Tomorrow I'll do Google Earth Battles, finish that. Yeah, yeah, I did Google Earth History today, finish that, and I'll finish Google Earth Battles tomorrow.
And then the other stuff, then go back to the history page.
Tomorrow's Sunday, so, yeah, a reason to just work on my website the whole time.
Oh, I downloaded, like, 262 green screen backgrounds, and, like, all different kinds.
That can actually help shape my story, too, you know, give me ideas.
And then I got 240 sound effects, all different kinds.
So, I wanted to, you know, like, watch layout.
That's another thing I'll do when I ride the bike.
I'll watch all of them and memorize what I have so I know, like, just calling it.
And then rename it and make it real simple to look at.
You know, you can see, like, 240, 260, you know, you can kind of see that right there, right in front of you.
So, and it's a lot.
And so, let's see how long.
Yeah, I'm really, like, tired right now.
Ooh, ooh, fresh yawn, though, of the video.
Oh, and I did some writing today.
Check out my Boulder Road page.
I explained it a little bit more.
It's fun to write.
But, yeah, that's all I have to say.
Peace out.
